title: IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Associate I Posts
description: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) has declared the latest job notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Associate I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the IARI Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
